macroeconomic_backdrop.crude_outlook: Depends entirely on Iran-US trajectory. Key levels: $95 (BULLISH), $110 (NEUTRAL), $120 (BEARISH).

confidence_summary.reason: Single binary variable (geopolitical) drives all theses. Prediction precision impossible until de-escalation narrative confirmed or reversed.
confidence_summary.expected_volatility: HIGH (±1-2% index moves on any news)
confidence_summary.best_case: De-escalation holds, FII buys, indices rally, P003 invalidates, P005 confirms
confidence_summary.worst_case: New escalation overnight, crude spikes, FII selling resumes, all plans flip
